# Feature Charter: Planning

## Purpose

Decompose reviewed specs into ordered implementation tasks with TDD expectations and context routing hints.

## Skills

- **adev-plan** — constitution-gated planning. Reads reviewed Live Specs, produces an ordered task list with dependencies, specialist routing hints, and context packet manifests. Uses a plan-reviewer subagent for quality.

## Key Behaviors

- Gated on `/adev-review-specs` passing — will not plan unreviewed specs
- Each task includes: description, acceptance criteria, TDD expectations, files to touch, specialist hint
- Plan output feeds directly into `/adev-implement`

## Key Files

- `skills/adev-plan/SKILL.md`
- `skills/adev-plan/plan-reviewer-prompt.md`
